title: RAG with Tables
constraints: Tables in documents must be preserved during chunking
The agent must correctly answer questions requiring tabular data
Chunk boundaries must not split table rows apart
The chunking strategy must handle both prose and tables in the same document
hints: Detect table boundaries before chunking and treat each table as an atomic unit
Consider using markdown or structured formats to represent tables in chunks
Use a custom text splitter that recognizes table delimiters and keeps tables intact

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI, OpenAIEmbeddings
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate
from langchain_community.vectorstores import FAISS
from langchain_core.documents import Document
from langchain.text_splitter import CharacterTextSplitter

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")
embeddings = OpenAIEmbeddings()

document_text = """Company Financial Report Q3 2024

Revenue Summary:
The company achieved strong growth across all segments.

| Region       | Q3 Revenue | Q2 Revenue | Growth |
|-------------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| North America | $45M      | $38M      | 18.4%  |
| Europe       | $32M      | $29M      | 10.3%  |
| Asia Pacific | $28M      | $22M      | 27.3%  |
| Latin America | $12M      | $11M      | 9.1%   |

Expense Breakdown:
Operating expenses were well managed this quarter.

| Category     | Amount  | % of Revenue |
|-------------|---------|-------------|
| R&D          | $25M    | 21.4%       |
| Sales        | $18M    | 15.4%       |
| Operations   | $15M    | 12.8%       |
| G&A          | $8M     | 6.8%        |

The company projects continued growth in Q4 2024."""

# BUG: Naive character splitting breaks tables apart
splitter = CharacterTextSplitter(chunk_size=150, chunk_overlap=20)
chunks = splitter.split_text(document_text)
docs = [Document(page_content=chunk) for chunk in chunks]

vectorstore = FAISS.from_documents(docs, embeddings)
retriever = vectorstore.as_retriever()

prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
    ("system", "Answer based on context.\n\nContext: {context}"),
    ("human", "{question}"),
])

def ask(question: str) -> str:
    retrieved = retriever.invoke(question)
    context = "\n".join([doc.page_content for doc in retrieved])
    chain = prompt | llm
    result = chain.invoke({"context": context, "question": question})
    return result.content

print(ask("What was the revenue growth in Asia Pacific?"))
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
from langchain_openai import OpenAIEmbeddings
from langchain_community.vectorstores import FAISS
from langchain_core.documents import Document
from langchain.text_splitter import CharacterTextSplitter

embeddings = OpenAIEmbeddings()

document_text = """Company Financial Report Q3 2024

Revenue Summary:
The company achieved strong growth across all segments.

| Region       | Q3 Revenue | Q2 Revenue | Growth |
|-------------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| North America | $45M      | $38M      | 18.4%  |
| Europe       | $32M      | $29M      | 10.3%  |
| Asia Pacific | $28M      | $22M      | 27.3%  |
| Latin America | $12M      | $11M      | 9.1%   |

Expense Breakdown:
Operating expenses were well managed this quarter.

| Category     | Amount  | % of Revenue |
|-------------|---------|-------------|
| R&D          | $25M    | 21.4%       |
| Sales        | $18M    | 15.4%       |
| Operations   | $15M    | 12.8%       |
| G&A          | $8M     | 6.8%        |

The company projects continued growth in Q4 2024."""

# BUG: Naive character splitting breaks tables apart
splitter = CharacterTextSplitter(chunk_size=150, chunk_overlap=20)
chunks = splitter.split_text(document_text)
docs = [Document(page_content=chunk) for chunk in chunks]

vectorstore = FAISS.from_documents(docs, embeddings)
retriever = vectorstore.as_retriever()

def ask(question: str) -> str:
    retrieved = retriever.invoke(question)
    context = "\n".join([doc.page_content for doc in retrieved])
    answerer = Agent(
        role="Financial Analyst",
        goal="Answer questions about financial data",
        backstory=f"Answer based on this context:\n{context}",
    )
    task = Task(description=question, expected_output="A data-backed answer", agent=answerer)
    crew = Crew(agents=[answerer], tasks=[task])
    return str(crew.kickoff())

print(ask("What was the revenue growth in Asia Pacific?"))
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner
from langchain_openai import OpenAIEmbeddings
from langchain_community.vectorstores import FAISS
from langchain_core.documents import Document
from langchain.text_splitter import CharacterTextSplitter

embeddings = OpenAIEmbeddings()

document_text = """Company Financial Report Q3 2024

Revenue Summary:
The company achieved strong growth across all segments.

| Region       | Q3 Revenue | Q2 Revenue | Growth |
|-------------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| North America | $45M      | $38M      | 18.4%  |
| Europe       | $32M      | $29M      | 10.3%  |
| Asia Pacific | $28M      | $22M      | 27.3%  |
| Latin America | $12M      | $11M      | 9.1%   |

Expense Breakdown:
Operating expenses were well managed this quarter.

| Category     | Amount  | % of Revenue |
|-------------|---------|-------------|
| R&D          | $25M    | 21.4%       |
| Sales        | $18M    | 15.4%       |
| Operations   | $15M    | 12.8%       |
| G&A          | $8M     | 6.8%        |

The company projects continued growth in Q4 2024."""

# BUG: Naive character splitting breaks tables apart
splitter = CharacterTextSplitter(chunk_size=150, chunk_overlap=20)
chunks = splitter.split_text(document_text)
docs = [Document(page_content=chunk) for chunk in chunks]

vectorstore = FAISS.from_documents(docs, embeddings)
retriever = vectorstore.as_retriever()

def ask(question: str) -> str:
    retrieved = retriever.invoke(question)
    context = "\n".join([doc.page_content for doc in retrieved])
    agent = Agent(
        name="Financial Analyst",
        instructions=f"Answer the question based on this context. Pay attention to table data.\n\nContext:\n{context}",
    )
    result = Runner.run_sync(agent, question)
    return result.final_output

print(ask("What was the revenue growth in Asia Pacific?"))

evaluationCriteria.label: Preserves table structure
evaluationCriteria.description: Tables are kept intact during chunking and not split across chunk boundaries

evaluationCriteria.label: Answers tabular questions correctly
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent correctly extracts and reports data from tables in the documents

evaluationCriteria.label: Handles mixed prose and tables
evaluationCriteria.description: The chunking strategy works for documents containing both narrative text and tables
